task_completion.description: Verify that the order is assigned to the correct customer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order details or creation page displays the customer as Jane Smith, username 'janesmith', or email 'jane.smith@example.com'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones are added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order items list includes 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' or the SKU 'SONY-WH1000XM5'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse is added to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order items list includes 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' or the SKU 'LOGI-MXM3S'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the WELCOME10 coupon code is applied to the order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order summary or totals section shows the coupon code 'WELCOME10' applied, or a discount reflecting 10% off the subtotal.

task_completion.description: Verify that the billing address is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The billing information section displays Jane Smith and the address '789 Oak Avenue, Portland, OR 97201, US'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the order state has been transitioned out of 'draft'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The order status is shown as 'Completed', 'Processing', 'Placed', or any state other than 'Draft', or there is a success message indicating the order was placed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with the admin interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the store's admin panel, not terminal commands or scripts creating the order.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual store.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL in the browser is http://localhost and the interface matches a genuine e-commerce admin dashboard.

integrity.description: Verify the results are genuine and not visually manipulated.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no signs of browser developer tools being used to alter the text or HTML on the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Customer details: Jane Smith (username: janesmith, email: jane.smith@example.com, uid: 3). Products: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones (SKU: SONY-WH1000XM5, $348.00) and Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S, $99.99). Subtotal before discount: $447.99.
